_doc: Hand-curated predicate-verb -> DPV processing-operation aliases for GDPR predicates whose surface verb does NOT lexically equal the DPV label but which ARE genuine processing operations. Checked AFTER exact DPV-label match and BEFORE the literal default, so it rescues true processing verbs from false-literal without reopening the embedding question (same deterministic-lexicon move as subject_lexicon.json). Keyed by verb lemma, matched against the predicate value's verb-lemma tokens. A value may map to multiple IRIs. Edit freely; trim the multi-IRI ones to your adjudicated choice.
